title: Senior Teacher - Disha Publication - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Disha Publication - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Disha Publication invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Disha Publication:
Disha Publication is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Disha Publication!
